system: Brian & Co Supplier + Luxury Recruitment + Product Image Tone Intelligence
luxury_targets: Saks / Neiman / Bloomingdale style vendor ecosystems
product_image_rules: Supplier product images must be reviewed before use.
Image usage rights must be confirmed before publishing.
Backgrounds should be removed or refined where appropriate.
Images should be adapted to Brian & Co's luxury visual tone.
No misleading brand logos or unauthorized affiliation presentation.
No counterfeit, replica, dupe, or uncertain-authenticity imagery.
Alt text must be generated for accessibility.
Founder approval required before publishing product images.
product_description_rules: Supplier descriptions are never copied blindly.
Descriptions must be rewritten in Brian & Co's refined tone.
Copy must be human, warm, clear, trustworthy, and never gimmicky.
Country of origin, condition, authenticity, warranty, return limits, and provenance should be included where applicable.
No spammy urgency or fake scarcity.
Founder approval required before publishing high-risk listings.
required_before_listing: supplier authorization or lawful resale basis
legal review for high-risk luxury listings
tone: trusted friend, knowledgeable, dependable, respectful of boundaries, refined, human, never gimmicky
